input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 35 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "mental", "count": 4, "message": "4 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 7, "message": "7 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 4, "message": "4 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 7, "message": "7 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "general", "count": 6, "message": "6 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 3, "message": "3 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 68, "current_utilization": 64, "recommendation": "Projected full in ~68 min. Monitor closely. Prepare contingency."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: St. Michael's Hospital is expecting 35 incoming patients, with critical clusters including 7 cardiac, 7 respiratory, 4 mental health, and 4 injury patients requiring immediate protocol activation. The facility is projected to reach full capacity in approximately 68 minutes, necessitating close monitoring and contingency planning. No diversion recommendations are currently in place.
